# Harbeni - Intelligent Systems & Sophisticated Design

Harbeni is a premier digital agency based in Brampton, Ontario (Greater Toronto Area), specializing in architecting high-performance web applications and autonomous AI agents.

## Services
- **Custom AI Agents**: Bespoke LLM-driven agents for business process automation.
- **High-Conversion Web Development**: Next.js-based web applications optimized for speed and SEO.
- **Workflow Automation**: Deep integration of AI into existing business CRMs and workflows.
- **SaaS Platforms**: End-to-end development of scalable software-as-a-service products.

## Core Tech Stack
- **Frontend**: Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS, Motion.
- **AI/ML**: Gemini 1.5 Pro API, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), Vector Databases.
- **Deployment**: Vercel, Secure API Architectures.
